caseStudies.title: Lead qualification for a B2B SaaS
caseStudies.outcome: Schema-validated warm / lukewarm / cold classification from long-form prospect content, with structured reasoning fields and audit logs.
caseStudies.summary: Replaced manual SDR-led lead grading with an LLM pipeline that reads articles, blog posts, and web pages, returns a strict JSON verdict, and writes an audit trail every team can defend.

caseStudies.title: Multi-bureau credit dashboards for a lending startup
caseStudies.outcome: Unified CIBIL, CRIF, and Equifax responses (consumer + commercial) into branded dashboards with derived utilization, tenure, and DPD insights.
caseStudies.summary: Ingested deeply nested bureau JSON variants and rendered them into a single branded report layer with derived insights credit teams could actually read.

caseStudies.title: Multi-tenant WhatsApp portal for an agency
caseStudies.outcome: Embedded Signup, template lifecycle, and broadcast infrastructure serving dozens of merchant tenants — no per-message BSP markup.
caseStudies.summary: Built the portal infrastructure that let an agency onboard merchant tenants directly via Meta Embedded Signup, owning the messaging margin instead of paying a BSP.

caseStudies.title: Ops automation for a financial services firm
caseStudies.outcome: n8n flows replaced manual onboarding coordination, document-chasing spreadsheets, and Slack-handoff Excel files — without a custom admin panel.
caseStudies.summary: Replaced an Excel-and-Slack ops process with n8n flows that route cases, chase documents, and notify teams — without engineering a single admin screen.
